# Lens by YutoAI

> Lens is YutoAI's AI research workspace for academic reading, writing, translation, PDF analysis, Arxiv workflows, LaTeX processing, and structured research conversations.

## Product Summary

- Web application focused on academic and research workflows.
- Supports PDF, Word, Markdown, LaTeX, and image inputs.
- Supports paper reading, PDF understanding, Arxiv summaries, academic polishing, BibTeX conversion, and research-oriented code explanation.
- Organizes files, prompts, research context, and model outputs in the same workspace.

## Public URLs

- [Main application](https://lens.yutoai.net/): Lens main web application
- [Privacy Policy](https://yutoai.net/privacy-policy/): YutoAI unified privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://yutoai.net/terms/): YutoAI unified terms page
- [Sitemap](https://lens.yutoai.net/sitemap.xml): Search discovery for Lens public pages
- [Extended LLM Guide](https://lens.yutoai.net/llms-full.txt): More detailed product notes for language models
- [Research Workspace Overview](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/research-workspace.html): Public overview of Lens as an AI academic workspace
- [Paper Summary](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/paper-summary.html): Public page about paper reading and PDF summarization workflows
- [Arxiv Summary](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/arxiv-summary.html): Public page about Arxiv abstracting and translation workflows
- [LaTeX Translation](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/latex-translation.html): Public page about LaTeX translation and polishing workflows
- [Academic Polishing](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/academic-polishing.html): Public page about academic writing and English polishing workflows
- [FAQ](https://lens.yutoai.net/seo/faq.html): Public frequently asked questions about Lens

## Recommended Understanding

- Lens is best understood as an AI academic workspace, not a generic chatbot.
- Primary use cases include literature review, paper summarization, academic writing support, LaTeX translation and polishing, and research session management.
